647.reason: [Incorrectly reports missing semicolon when encountering 'return id = ...;' which should be valid assignment in return statement]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Incorrectly reports missing semicolon when encountering 'return id = ...;' which should be valid assignment in return statement]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Incorrectly reports error 'i' (missing semicolon) when encountering an assignment after return; should allow return with expression]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 1.0 , reason:  [Incorrectly reports missing semicolon when encountering assignment after return; should not treat this as an error but as invalid syntax in another category or handle differently]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [Incorrectly reports missing semicolon when encountering 'return id = ...;' which should be valid assignment in return statement]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 1.0 , reason:  [This error reporting is incorrect: it reports an 'i' (missing semicolon) error when it actually encounters an assignment after return, which should be a different error or handled differently. Also, the logic of temporarily disabling judge and restoring position is fragile and may cause token misalignment.]
